modules.sql: SELECT ct.merchant_category_code AS mcc_code, COALESCE(mc.mcc_description, '') AS mcc_description, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(ct.amount) AS total_spending, (SELECT ifw_effective_date FROM card_transactions LIMIT 1) AS ifw_effective_date FROM card_transactions ct LEFT JOIN (SELECT mcc_code, mcc_description FROM merchant_categories GROUP BY mcc_code) mc ON ct.merchant_category_code = mc.mcc_code GROUP BY ct.merchant_category_code ORDER BY ct.merchant_category_code
